Release AAB build requested: 2026-07-11T20:00:00Z (v1.3.0 — friends experience overhaul)
version: 1.3.0 (build name 1.3.0; versionCode = build-aab run number, strictly increasing)
signing: Play upload key SHA-1 EA:3B (from UPLOAD_* secrets / embedded)
package: com.whoisthere.app (matches Play Console)
note: v1.3.0 — everything from v1.2.0 (proverbs rebus game) is included, plus:
  fixed friend groups (cumulative scoreboard, persistent chat, one-tap
  invite the whole squad or a chosen subset), push notifications for game
  invites/friend requests/group invites (group joins now require explicit
  accept, WhatsApp-style — declining creates no membership), end-of-round
  scoreboard shown between heat images, host toggle for tricks on/off in
  classic friends games, direct-join deep link (whoisthere://join?code=),
  a single grand-finale win effect for everyone (past buyers auto-refunded),
  a much more accessible lobby invite hub (share row, groups quick-invite,
  tricks toggle all inline), 5% smaller global text, and several stability/
  accessibility/nav-bar-clipping fixes.
note2: versionCode auto = build-aab run number.
trigger: session-branch push (MCP workflow_dispatch lacks actions:write)
